title: Missing refresh token in custom Zoho Sign OAuth2 credentials
symptom: When the access token expires, the error 'ERR_ASSERTION - refreshToken is required' occurs due to the absence of a refresh token in the stored credentials.
applies_when: Using custom Zoho Sign OAuth2 credentials
not_this_if: Refresh token is present in the credentials
root_cause: The refresh token is not returned because the initial token request did not include the 'access_type=offline' parameter. Without this parameter, the OAuth2 flow defaults to online mode, which does not provide a refresh token.
fix_steps: Modify the OAuth2 authorization URL to include 'access_type=offline' and '&prompt=consent'.
Re-authenticate to obtain a new access token and refresh token.
agent_instruction: Update the OAuth2 authorization URL to include 'access_type=offline' and re-authenticate.
